chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A.No. 137 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA 1407/2019. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.10.2025. Mr. Abdul Ghafoor Hakro, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Abid Hussain, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.1, taken on record. Respondents Mian Haroon and Syed Juman Shah present in person. = Counsel for the applicant no longer wishes to press this Lis and has filed an application U/O 23 Rule 1 CPC for withdrawal of this Revision. Office is directed to allot number to the said application. Revision Application and the pending application stands dismissed as withdrawn simpliciter in these terms alongwith all legal consequences. JUDGE Tufail
